emails.subject: Re: Counterparty Approval Lists for 7/31/00, 8/1/00 and 8/2/00
emails.body: Re: Counterparty Approval Lists for 7/31/00, 8/1/00 and 8/2/00 Tana, With regards to the division issue- we(Product Control) don't necessarily know that a company is a division until we receive the profile from credit. We then request a new PA from the company with the division language added. We make sure that we receive the corrected PA before we send out the password and user ID. Please let me know if you have any questions regarding this. Thanks, Stephanie From: Tana Jones on 08/03/2000 05:05 PM

emails.subject: Re: Counterparty Approval Lists for 7/31/00, 8/1/00 and 8/2/00

Please let me know if you have any questions regarding this. Thanks, Stephanie From: Tana Jones on 08/03/2000 05:05 PM
